title: Yoqtan #3355
definition:
Joktan = "smallness"

 1) son of Eber and descendant of Shem and patriarch of various
    Arabian tribes
nasbUsage:
Definition: Joktan = "smallness"

 1) son of Eber and descendant of Shem and patriarch of various
    Arabian tribes

    NASB:  a desc. of Shem and ancestor of several Arabian tribes
